featured.heading: Featured Projects
featured.subtitle: Discover some of my most recent work
featured.ctaText: See all my projects, filter by specific technologies or skills, and discover more about my professional experience.

list.emptyText: Try adjusting your search or filters to find what you're looking for.

items.title: IARA – AI / GPU Research (LLMs from scratch)
items.description: An AI research ecosystem built entirely from scratch in Rust and Python, without high-level ML frameworks. It includes an LLM inference engine with dynamic GPU backend (ROCm/HIP + OpenCL) and byte-level language models—operating directly on 256 bytes instead of BPE tokens, with hand-written GPU kernels, backpropagation, optimizers, and quantization formats. This is how I deepen my understanding of the systems behind modern AI rather than just consuming APIs.
responsibilities: Implemented a byte-level transformer from scratch in wgpu/WGSL: tiled GEMM, causal softmax, RMSNorm, complete forward + backward passes, and AdamW optimizer, all resident on the GPU.
Wrote custom GPU kernels and optimized throughput (block-diagonal batching B×T, on-device clip-norm), achieving ~53k tokens/s on an AMD RX 6750 XT (RDNA2).
Built an LLM inference engine with HTTP/WebSocket API and Vue 3 frontend, supporting Qwen, Llama, Mistral, Phi, and Gemma in safetensors/GGUF formats.
Researched quantization (ternary / BitNet / custom .dna format) and distillation from larger models to compact byte-level models.

items.title: Webjasper
items.description: Deployed a real-time monitoring platform for supermarket chains, consisting of an on-site agent (robot) and a web administrative panel. The solution captures connection metrics, data transfer volumes, types of information collected, and generates error reports and automatic alerts via SMS and email.
responsibilities: Designed and implemented a RESTful API in NestJS, ensuring high availability and security in agent messaging.
Developed the dashboard in Next.js + Chakra UI, with interactive dashboards displaying usage statistics and event logs.
Coordinated asynchronous job logic (Node Cron and Worker Threads) to automate data collection and alert triggering.
Configured CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, Docker orchestration, and Nginx reverse proxy, ensuring consistent deployments and rapid rollbacks.
Integrated PrismaORM and Jest for data modeling and automated testing, increasing system reliability.
Prepared analytical reports in Metabase, enabling the operations team to make data-driven decisions.

items.title: ApexHub – Sports Events Platform
items.description: Acted as full-stack in creating a ticket and services marketplace for sports events. From the institutional website to administrative panels for clients and companies, I evolved the initial MVP into a scalable solution, while also handling infrastructure and deployment automation.
responsibilities: Developed front-end in Next.js + Tailwind, with sales pages and checkout optimized for conversion.
Modeled and implemented backend in Django, integrating Celery for asynchronous processing of notifications and sales reports.
Created a customized administrative panel in React, offering complete control of registrations, events, and financial reports via Pagar.me API.
Managed CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure, ensuring zero-downtime releases.
Took full autonomy post-launch, executing bugfixes, minor feature implementations, and performance adjustments.

items.title: Mingoo – Tourism Tours Booking Platform
items.description: Participated in creating a web and mobile app platform for online booking of guided tourism tours. I structured the API and administrative panel, in addition to implementing static and dynamic pages that integrate rich content with real-time booking features.
responsibilities: Developed endpoints in NestJS + PrismaORM for tour guide registrations, tours, and reservations, with availability and payment controls.
Implemented the dashboard in Next.js + Material-UI, enabling route management, scheduling, and billing reports.
Structured periodic jobs (Node Cron) and workers for sending confirmations and automatic reminders, reducing no-shows by 30%.
Configured Docker environments with Nginx and GitHub Actions pipelines, ensuring scalability and safe rollbacks.
Created dashboards in Metabase, tracking sales metrics, cancellations, and guide ratings.

items.title: House Cell
items.description: Developed a simple e-commerce where customers build their shopping cart and, upon checkout, automatically initiate a WhatsApp conversation with the shopkeeper to complete the sale.
responsibilities: Structured a SPA in React with styled-components, ensuring responsive and modular UI.
Implemented backend in Express + Mongoose, creating endpoints for product CRUD and cart management.
Integrated WhatsApp API for automatic message sending with order details.

items.title: Finance
items.description: Worked on creating a unified portal ("hub") to centralize all Finance services, with strong integration to Microsoft Teams and Power BI ecosystems, providing users with a single access point for chat, meetings, calendar, and financial reports.
responsibilities: Implemented front-end in React + Redux + Ant Design, consuming MSAL for Azure AD authentication.
Developed integrations with Microsoft Graph API: chat, meeting creation/editing/deletion, and calendar display.
Displayed embedded Power BI dashboards, enabling navigation and visualization of interactive reports.
Structured backend in NestJS + TypeORM, defining data models and secure routes; covered functionalities with Jest.

items.title: Centerlight
items.description: Full-stack in an aerodrome management and runway lighting device platform. I created user/permission APIs and aerodrome management APIs, all orchestrated via API Gateway for efficient inter-service communication.
responsibilities: Planned and implemented frontend in Next.js + Tailwind, with login screens, dashboard, and device management.
Developed user and permission API in NestJS + Prisma, with role hierarchy and access validation.
Continued building the aerodrome API in NestJS + TypeORM; registered aerodromes, geolocation, device status, and real-time scheduling.
Collaborated on implementing an API Gateway for dynamic routing and security (JWT), deployment orchestration with Docker + GitHub Actions.

items.title: Hashpay
items.description: Developed initial website pages and administrative panel for selling mining terahash, allowing users to purchase hash capacity and configure receivables from a web portal.
responsibilities: Implemented frontend in Next.js + Tailwind, with purchase flow and subscription dashboards.
Modeled backend in Django, creating APIs for plan registration, payment processing, and contract management.

items.title: Super Bike
items.description: Started as frontend and, throughout the project, collaborated on backend improvements. The project consisted of a marketplace for bike parts and services, with product registration, cart, and customer area.
responsibilities: Developed a SPA in React + Material-UI + styled-components, implementing dynamic filters with Redux and GraphQL.
Supported the construction of a GraphQL API in Express + Knex, creating resolvers and unit tests in Jest.
Collaborated on query optimization and performance bug fixes.

items.title: Professor Ferreto
items.description: Support and development of new features for both the Administrative Panel and the App. Planning and execution of new activities with the Professor Ferreto team, following business rules and managing delivery timelines.
responsibilities: Built mobile app in React Native + Redux + GraphQL, integrating SQLite for offline cache and push notifications.
Developed web in React + Material-UI, creating reusable components and managing state with useContext.
Implemented backend in Express + GraphQL + Mongoose, defining content models and data resolvers.

items.title: PV Operations | SunWeg
items.description: Finalization and support of mobile app for monitoring photovoltaic systems, enabling real-time data display and failure alerts.
responsibilities: Developed final screens and refinements in React Native + Expo, with push notifications and Axios integration.
Adjusted API consumption logic and state management with useContext, improving stability on unstable networks.

items.title: Sodexo | Pluxee (Wizeo)
items.description: Support and maintenance of app and web portal for corporate benefits, working with the Sodexo team to evolve front-ends consuming internal APIs.
responsibilities: Created components in React Native + styled-components and React + Material-UI, integrating Redux and Axios.
Implemented push notification flow and UI/UX adjustments according to brand guidelines.

items.title: Plathanus Website & Blog
items.description: Technical leadership on Plathanus's institutional website and blog, acting from conception to deployment and coordinating junior developers.
responsibilities: Planned Next.js + Chakra UI architecture, defining post flow, SEO, and page templates.
Backend implementation in Express + TypeORM to manage posts, users, and comments.
Mentored 2 junior developers, creating code guidelines and PR reviews.

items.title: CashOpera
items.description: Collaboration in developing a mobile app for financial operations, with in-app purchases and notifications.
responsibilities: Created interfaces in React Native + Expo, integrating service purchases via In-App Purchase and push notifications.
Refactored Python/Django + Celery endpoints, improving performance of asynchronous task processing.

items.title: Multiplicara
items.description: Finalization, support, and maintenance of challenges and rewards app, with purchase flows, notifications, and video streaming.
responsibilities: Delivered screens in React Native + Expo, integrating notifications and In-App Purchases.
Adjusted backend in Express + TypeORM, configuring jobs with Node Cron and Worker Threads for reminder sending.
